sub_tasks.desc: Coder Agent: Construct the Admin CRM Dashboard displaying student status tables and real-time alerts filtering candidates with remaining_days <= 3.
Coder Agent: Build promotion management views (sys_promotions) and real-time notification delivery log grids mapping transactional history channels (Zalo/FCM) bounded by tenant isolation rules.
Coder Agent: Mount programmatic 'Send Notice' and 'Launch Promotion Campaign' elements communicating with the backend Kafka resource layers.
Tester Agent: Author UI validation routines testing data masking security rules and automated delivery log state changes under Playwright simulator spaces.
Bug Fixer Agent: Validate frontend component compilation against strict Next.js App Router rules and check strict multi-tenant isolation gates.
Documentation Agent: Map data contracts, promotion lifecycle triggers, notice logs tracking flows, and CRM-to-Zalo communication sequence charts.
Coder Agent: Formulate static bundle next export build configurations and map application bridge parameters inside capacitor.config.json files.
Tester Agent: Author build verification scripts auditing the static asset tree compile structures against target native mobile sub-projects (/ios and /android).
Bug Fixer Agent: Audit Capacitor native bridging layer variables, capturing webview initialization failures, and patch JavaScript wrapper definitions.
Documentation Agent: Standardize mobile runtime wrapping instructions, static export parameters, and cross-platform compilation blueprints.
Coder Agent & Tester Agent: Develop full-scale end-to-end automation scripts utilizing Playwright to challenge complete integration systems under real headless browser profiles.
Tester Agent: Model continuous journey simulations validating concurrent multi-language swapping, token creation, dynamic barcode rendering, and administrative CRM push triggers.
Bug Fixer Agent: Run comprehensive E2E pipeline executions, capture element lookup errors or state synchronization breaks, and optimize test locators dynamically.
Documentation Agent: Compile end-to-end test execution trace metrics, crawl-index compliance validation logs, and hypermedia alternate tag checks.
Coder Agent: Construct multi-stage GraalVM native Docker configurations utilizing Mandrel container engines to output stripped production binaries.
Tester Agent: Configure a centralized local orchestration compose stack checking initial boot health bounds across backend services, queues, and databases.
Bug Fixer Agent: Execute container compilation tests, debug runtime GraalVM substitution errors or shared network timeouts, and rewrite Docker layer patterns.
Documentation Agent: Chart multi-container system deployment structures, container sizing metrics, and local environment compose configuration logs.
Coder Agent: Generate declarative Kubernetes infrastructure manifest files controlling GKE pod deployment specifications, SEO ingress path rewrites, and autoscale rules.
Tester Agent: Execute automated linter scripts and boundary compliance test sweeps checking active K8s manifest files against deployment specifications.
Bug Fixer Agent: Intercept Kubernetes API deployment warnings, diagnose resource limit discrepancies or incorrect path definitions, and fix YAML nodes.
Documentation Agent: Compile cluster pod orchestration layout charts, dynamic scale metrics, and Ingress routing translation maps.
Coder Agent: Construct automated pipeline deployment workflows running via GitHub Actions bound strictly to merge states on the master release branch.
Tester Agent: Connect static analysis security checkers (SAST) and automated code coverage reporting components to enforce strict quality gates before cloud deployment.
Bug Fixer Agent: Diagnose CI/CD workflow runtime permission rejections, fix encrypted secrets validation breaks, and re-run automation scripts until fully successful.
Documentation Agent: Map secrets injection guidelines, cluster authentication handshakes, rolling-update verification parameters, and rollback metrics.
